evals.name: idempotent-creation
evals.prompt: Design a POST endpoint to create a subscription.
evals.expected_output: Support for an Idempotency-Key header and a check for existing requests.

evals.name: normalized-envelope
evals.prompt: Return an error when a user is not found.
evals.expected_output: A 404 response with a standard { status: 'error', error: { ... } } JSON body.
